subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the host of the strangers in the path of God! Blessed art thou, for thou hast become the refuge of the captives of the All-Merciful and hast rendered selfless service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهماندار غربای راه خدا خوشا بحال تو که میزبان اسراء رحمن شدی و بخدمت بی سر
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @hospitality
